market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience the breathtaking beauty of the Peak District in our cosy cottage, perfectly situated in the heart of this stunning national park. With a nightly rate of £143, our entire home is an affordable luxury, accommodating up to 4 guests. Enjoy the tranquility of the surroundings and the comfort of our well-appointed cottage, ideal for a relaxing retreat. As a new host, I am dedicated to providing exceptional service and ensuring your stay is nothing short of wonderful.
analysis.photo_order_rec: The cover photo should be of the living room or a notable outdoor feature to immediately showcase the cosy atmosphere and Peak District beauty, setting the tone for the rest of the photos.
key_diagnosis: With 48.9% occupancy over the next 90 days, there's a significant opportunity to increase bookings, especially considering the cohort median occupancy is 28.3%
The nightly rate of £143 is -18% compared to the cohort median of £175, suggesting potential for rate optimization or highlighting unique selling points to justify the current rate

With only 39 reviews and a rating of 4.87, focusing on improving host reputation through enhanced guest experiences and encouraging more reviews could significantly boost visibility and attractiveness
analysis.outreach_hook: With your current occupancy at 48.9% compared to the cohort median of 28.3%, there's a substantial opportunity to increase bookings and revenue, potentially by £143 per available night for the 46 open nights in the next 90 days
